description_long: This is a single-story brick bungalow with a flat roof and a modern, rectangular layout. The exterior features large, white-framed windows on the front and sides, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The main entrance is accentuated by a dark door and a small black-tiled porch, flanked by two tall potted shrubs. Along one side of the building, a row of evenly spaced potted plants adds greenery and visual interest. The interior layout is visible, showing multiple rooms with light-colored walls and wooden flooring. The overall design is clean and functional, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story brick bungalow with large windows, a flat roof, and a small porch, complemented by potted plants along the exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, black-tiled porch, and two tall potted shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the row of potted plants and the solid brick wall with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a long, uninterrupted brick wall with a few small windows and no visible entrance.
description_view_3: Angled view from the back corner, showing the building's depth, flat roof, and the arrangement of interior rooms.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
